class.name: TwitchMessage
class.brief_description: Represents a fully parsed raw Twitch IRC protocol message.
class.description: Extends the standardized IRC message to incorporate Twitch-specific capabilities such as badges, emotes, cheer tracking, and native broadcaster flags seamlessly mapped into a standalone node wrapper natively.

method.name: get_color
method.description: Returns a hexadecimal hex code string signifying the external user's customizable chat display aesthetic coloration naturally.

method.name: get_display_name
method.description: Returns the localized Twitch identifier handle ensuring perfectly accurate case-sensitivity for accurate API tracking parameters.

method.name: get_msg_id
method.description: Returns the msg id. [param tags] - Tags.

method.name: get_room_id
method.description: Returns the Twitch specific channel identifier natively binding the network elements to a standardized backend channel database layer securely.

method.name: get_twitch_command
method.description: Returns the twitch command. [param message] - Message.

method.name: get_user_id
method.description: Returns the sender's explicit numerical Twitch networking UUID identifier securely matching standard user configurations effectively.

method.name: is_moderator
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the target message sender structurally possesses generalized external channel administration flags securely.

method.name: is_subscriber
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the sender object registers perfectly natively inside the Twitch channel subscriber data configuration layer.

method.name: is_twitch_command
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if twitch command. [param message] - Message.

method.name: is_vip
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the sequence client evaluates correctly against internal Twitch broadcasting administration privileges as a localized VIP.

method.name: parse_badges
method.description: Returns parse badges. [param badges_string] - Badges string.

method.name: parse_emote_sets
method.description: Returns parse emote sets. [param emote_sets_string] - Emote sets string.

method.name: parse_emotes
method.description: Returns parse emotes. [param emotes_string] - Emotes string.

method.name: parse_system_message
method.description: Returns parse system message. [param system_msg] - System msg.
